detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BotAI._transfer(address,address,uint256) (BotAI.sol#653-777):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (BotAI.sol#717)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (BotAI.sol#791-803)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (BotAI.sol#723)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (BotAI.sol#811)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BotAI.sol#775)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (BotAI.sol#937)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (BotAI.sol#917)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (BotAI.sol#919)
	BotAI._rOwned (BotAI.sol#329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BotAI._takeTeam(uint256) (BotAI.sol#931-939)
	- BotAI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (BotAI.sol#891-927)
	- BotAI.balanceOf(address) (BotAI.sol#479-483)
	- BotAI.constructor() (BotAI.sol#413-443)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BotAI.sol#775)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (BotAI.sol#945)
	BotAI._rTotal (BotAI.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BotAI._getCurrentSupply() (BotAI.sol#1087-1097)
	- BotAI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (BotAI.sol#943-949)
	- BotAI.constructor() (BotAI.sol#413-443)
	- BotAI.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (BotAI.sol#575-597)
